_publications._publicationTitle: The development of an artificial intelligence auto-segmentation tool for 3D volumetric analysis of vestibular schwannomas.

_contextSnippet: A mean DICE score of 0.76 (standard deviation 0.21) was achieved in a proof-of-concept (POC) of the model. After the final testing stage, the final mean DICE score was 0.88
details: Significant improvement in performance demonstrated, with DICE scores improving from proof-of-concept mean of 0.76 (SD 0.21) to final version mean of 0.88 (SD 0.04)
